text.title: Gemini Function Calling Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for gemini-fc-config.json: mode + tools + response schema.

example.note: Fails: mode not in enum (auto vs automatic), description missing/short, only 1 tool but spec allows; also schema requires description with minLength 30.

list.item: Every tool has name + description ≥30 chars.
If JSON output expected, response_schema set.
